title: Microsized RNA-derived RNAs and polypeptides in human cells
author: Huang, Xiaoqiang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository comprises the predicted sequences for microsized RNA-derived RNAs (midRs) and polypeptides (midPs), main source/raw data, and scripts for midR/midP prediction. Refer to the AAA_README.pdf for details.
steps_raw: This repository comprises the predicted sequences for microsized RNA-derived RNAs (midRs) and polypeptides (midPs), main source/raw data, and scripts for midR/midP prediction. Refer to the AAA_README.pdf for details.
